paperQuestionsVOS.title: 小杨最近在准备考GESP，他用的Python IDLE来练习和运行程序，所以Python IDLE也是一个小型操作系统。 （ ）

paperQuestionsVOS.analyzeContent:
n = int(input())

i = int(input())


k = 1

while True:

  ans = k * n + i

  for j in range(1, n):

    if ans % (n - 1) != 0:

      flag = False

      break

    ans = ans // (n - 1) * n + i

  else:

    break

  k += 1


print(ans)

n = int(input())

for i in range(n):

  input_buf = input()

  x, unit1, _, __, unit2 = input_buf.split(' ')

  assert unit1[-1] == unit2[-1]

  def get_base(unit):

    if len(unit) == 1:

      return 1000

    elif unit[0] == "m":

      return 1

    else:

      return 1000000

  y = int(x) * (get_base(unit1) // get_base(unit2))

  output_buf = input_buf.replace("?", str(y))

  print(output_buf)
